summary: The PoC demonstrates SSRF by starting a mock internal HTTP service alongside a Gotenberg instance, sending a request to the Chromium URL conversion endpoint with the internal service URL, and verifying the internal service's proof string appears in the resulting PDF.
expected_security_impact: Running the reproduction pipeline should cause Gotenberg's Chromium instance to navigate to the mock internal HTTP service and render its HTML response as a PDF. The returned PDF will contain the proof string from the mock internal service, confirming the server made a request to an internal URL that the attacker chose.
actual_observed_result: PoC not executed in this session. The reproduction bundle is self-contained and ready for execution with Docker.
verification_method: The run script starts a mock internal service that returns a unique proof string (EVOHUNT_SSRF_PROOF_a1b2c3d4e5f6) in its HTML response. It then asks Gotenberg to convert that internal URL to PDF via the /forms/chromium/convert/url endpoint. Finally, it extracts text from the resulting PDF using pypdf and confirms the proof string is present, proving the server-side request to the internal service was made and its response was rendered.
limitations_or_blockers: The PoC was not executed during this session because Docker is not available in the analysis environment.
The reproduction bundle requires Docker to build the images and run the containers.

reproduction.source_acquisition: run.sh clones the target repository on the host, checks out the pinned ref, and mounts that checkout into the verification container at /target-repo.
